gist.headline: Once upon a markdown
gist.blurb: StoryTale has officially joined our community writing apps! Generate tales and export them straight to Markdown with all your formatting perfectly preserved.
gist.summary: Added StoryTale to the community apps showcase, a new writing tool that supports exporting generated stories to Markdown.
gist.impact: Writers and creators can now discover StoryTale in the apps directory to generate stories and easily export them for publishing.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as a writer/storyteller. A magical book or scroll with Markdown symbols (like # or **) floating around. Cozy library or writing desk setting.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny reading glasses, writing a story in a glowing magical book on a wooden desk. Floating pixelated Markdown symbols surround the pages. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny reading glasses, writing a story in a glowing magical book on a wooden desk.
